name: textbox
description: Free-form text entry, single- or multi-line. APG has no pattern page for it -- confirmed against the pattern index, not assumed -- so ARIA 1.2's role reference is the pattern's source instead.

requires.roles.label: an accessible name is required
requires.states.multiline: aria-multiline reflects whether the control accepts more than one line
requires.states.required: aria-required set to true when a value is mandatory
requires.states.readonly: aria-readonly set to true when the value cannot be edited
